title: Auditar Segurança de Dados
overall_posture: INSUFFICIENT for production with real data

checks.title: PII Protection
checks.evidence: No classical PII fields (email, phone, CPF) in data models. However: (1) chat_service.py:_run_subprocess stores full stdout, stderr, and command in message metadata verbatim — agent outputs may contain sensitive data; (2) chat_store.py:87 derives session title from first 72 chars of user message, exposing prompt content in session listings.

checks.title: Data Minimization
checks.evidence: Full subprocess stdout, stderr, and command list persisted unconditionally in every chat message metadata (chat_service.py). No truncation, no filtering. ChatMessageCreateRequest.content has no max_length constraint (schemas.py:249). Activity event payloads accept arbitrary dicts without size constraints (event_writer.py:build_event).

checks.title: Retention Policy
checks.evidence: No retention policy defined or documented for any data category. Chat sessions (.roadmap/chat_sessions/*.json) accumulate indefinitely with no TTL or automatic cleanup. activity.jsonl is append-only with no rotation, archival, or maximum size constraint. No RETENTION_POLICY.md or equivalent documentation found in docs/ or .roadmap/.

checks.title: Anonymization / Pseudonymization
checks.evidence: Positive: actor fields in activity events use agent identifiers (claude-code, gemini-cli, codex) — implicit pseudonymization of operator identity. Gap: no anonymization of agent output content before persistence; no regex/pattern scrubbing for PII in stored stdout/stderr; no documented anonymization architecture.
lines: event_writer.py:44-56 (actor field — agent-id only, no personal identity)

checks.title: LGPD/GDPR Compliance
checks.evidence: No privacy notice, no consent mechanism, no data subject rights endpoints, no ROPA, no DPO designation. CORS misconfiguration (main.py:28-34): allow_origins='*' combined with allow_credentials=True contradicts CORS spec and signals absence of meaningful cross-origin access control. No encryption at rest for chat_sessions/ or activity.jsonl. System label as 'PoC' does not exempt from LGPD/GDPR if deployed with real operator or project data.

additional_findings.title: Path Traversal in chat_store.py impacts data confidentiality
additional_findings.evidence: chat_store.py:load_session and delete_session use session_id as a filename without traversal sanitization. session_id='../../roadmap/roadmap' reads or deletes canonical audit artifacts. Cross-cutting data integrity and confidentiality impact.
